expectations.text: A handoff markdown file was created
The handoff document is under 100 lines total
The YAML frontmatter has 7 or fewer fields
expectations.evidence: 6 fields: date, git_commit, branch, repository, ticket, summary

expectations.text: The Learnings section inlines knowledge rather than pointing to files
expectations.evidence: Line 19: 'All repositories follow the same structure as user_repo.go — use QueryRowContext + Scan into a struct' — states the pattern, doesn't just say 'see user_repo.go'

expectations.text: The References section has 3 or fewer files in the 'read on resume' tier
The document does NOT have a separate 'Recent changes' or 'Artifacts' section
expectations.evidence: Sections are: Tasks, Learnings, Next Step, References

expectations.text: There is a single clear 'Next Step' rather than a numbered list of 5+ action items
expectations.evidence: Line 27: Single paragraph — 'Create config/preferences_schema.json with the allowed preference keys, then implement the validation middleware'

expectations.text: Action items are specific not vague
expectations.evidence: Names exact files to create and implement

expectations.text: The document does not contain code blocks longer than 10 lines
